svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="2" border="0"> <diagram name="Purchase Flow" id="purchase1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1459" dy="765" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="5940" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pool" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;horizontal=1;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Purchase Preapproval Journey" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="930" width="5860" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane0" parent="pool" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;startSize=40;" value="Visitor / Applicant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="5860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="lane0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Visitor lands on Home
or /purchase page" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="lane0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Visitor clicks CTA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="600" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="lane0" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;" value="Has existing
Rocket account?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="800" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s16" parent="lane0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Visitor reviews &
selects loan option" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="3200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" parent="lane0" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;" value="Wants to talk
to a person?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="3600" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s25" parent="lane0" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=15;" value="Visitor reviews
Closing Disclosure
(3-day TRID)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="5000" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s27" parent="lane0" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=15;" value="Sign documents,
loan funds" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="5400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane1" parent="pool" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;startSize=40;" value="Marketing Site" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="5860" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="lane1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Site shows CTA:
'See what I qualify for'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge22" edge="1" parent="lane1" style="rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=15;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="3880" y="-20" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="3880" y="240" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge23" edge="1" parent="lane1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=15;" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="3740.0023529411756" y="-90.00117647058829" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="3880.1788235294116" y="239.94" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane2" parent="pool" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;startSize=40;" value="Rocket Application
(Launchpad)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="5860" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Sign in (pre-filled
application)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1000" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="'What are you looking
to do?' -> Buy a home" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="800" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="Property details:
location, type, use" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1000" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="Purchase timeline
(researching/under contract)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="lane2" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;" value="Already have an
agent / found home?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="1400" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Capture property
address / MLS info" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1600" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="Create account
(email, phone, password)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1800" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s10" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="Soft credit pull
consent (zero impact)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="2000" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s11" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="Income & employment

path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 2930px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
